caption: A woman with blonde hair tied in a bun stands before a plain white background, wearing a dark navy blazer over a maroon top. A small microphone is clipped to her clothing. To her side, a clear plastic water bottle sits on a white surface. In the top-left corner of the scene, the logo "mediasite" is visible. In the first frame, she has her right hand raised toward her chest. As the sequence progresses, she lowers her hand and begins to speak, with her mouth slightly open in the second frame. By the final two frames, she has lowered both hands, eventually clasping them together in front of her. Throughout the clip, her gaze shifts slightly, and her facial expression remains serious and focused as she delivers her presentation.
